questionHtml:
What process occurs in both mitosis and meiosis?

A. Formation of chiasmata

B. Reduction division

C. Separation of chromatids

D. Exchange of alleles between non-sister chromatids

meta.title: What process occurs in both mitosis and meiosis? A. Formation of chiasmata B. Reduction division C. Separation of chromatids D. Exchange of alleles between non-sister chromatids
